hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,os,time; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); os.makedirs('/tmp/claude-backups',exist_ok=True); (fp.endswith(('.json','.jsonc','.yaml','.yml')) and os.path.isfile(fp)) and __import__('shutil').copy2(fp,f'/tmp/claude-backups/{int(time.time())}-{os.path.basename(fp)}')" 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "import sys,json,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath','') or d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); fp.endswith(('.json','.jsonc','.yaml','.yml')) and os.system(f'npx prettier --write \"{fp}\"')" 2>/dev/null || true
